steps.title: Use hemisphere volume
steps.content:
A hemisphere is half of a sphere. Since a sphere has volume $$\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3$$, a hemisphere has volume:
$$V=\frac{1}{2}\cdot\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3=\frac{2}{3}\pi r^3$$

steps.title: Approximate the volume
steps.content:
Use $\pi$ as $3.14159$:
$$191{,}664(3.14159)=602{,}138.51376$$
The closest listed value is $602{,}000$. The answer is D.
